sections.description: WordPress-native hotel CRM with calendar, bookings, guests, importer, room management, and GitHub-based updating.
sections.changelog:
• 1.8.8: Allow Add Booking to ignore accidentally added empty room rows.
  • 1.8.7: Fix Add Booking room availability for manually created CRM rooms.
  • 1.8.6: Simplify updater path handling and move booking meta row above guest details.
